description: CompositionBlue denim trousers made of a blended fabric, has two side pockets with a patch pocket above the right one that has red stitch detailing, two large back pockets with stitch detailing, comfortable waist with loops and brand patch, and has a zippered and buttoned closure Fit Loose fit; Regular rise FitLoose fit; Regular riseWash careMachine wash separately using mild detergentDo not dry clean, do not bleachDrip dryWarm iron
